description: Roomy zippered inner compartment with a laptop compartment and a velcro closure to keep the laptop in place Organizer space to hold essentials like a mouse or mobile Three zippered pockets on the front to stow away essentials Brand tab appliqué d on the side Brand name and logo on the front Haul loop and soft handle for handling ease Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned panels on the back for added comfort Ergonomic design to fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life
